articles.title: Hungary's Big Vote: A Chance for Change
articles.summary: In Hungary, many people are voting in an important election. This vote could decide if Prime Minister Viktor Orbán stays in power after 16 years. His rival, Péter Magyar, is leading in polls and wants to make Hungary stronger in the EU and NATO, and fight corruption. Orbán says he is here to win and has support from some voters. Voting ends in the evening, and results will come out later. More people voted this time, showing high interest. Magyar promises change and better relations with Europe, while Orbán focuses on protecting Hungary from outside pressures. This election matters for Hungary and other countries like the US and Russia.

articles.title: Why the UK Isn't Worried About Chinese Cars
articles.summary: In the UK, a new battery factory called Agratas is being built to make parts for electric cars. This is important because it helps the British car industry. Recently, a Chinese car called the Jaecoo 7 became the top-selling car in the UK for the first time. Many Chinese cars are electric, and they now make up about 15% of new cars sold in the UK. The government says this is okay because it gives people more choices and could bring jobs and investment if Chinese companies build factories in the UK. Some people worry about competition and safety, but the government is relaxed about it.

articles.title: Astronauts Come Home After a Big Space Trip
articles.summary: Four astronauts came back to Earth after a special space mission called Artemis II. They traveled far into space, even farther than people have gone before, and saw the back side of the moon. When they landed in the ocean near San Diego, a ship picked them up. Then, they flew to Houston, Texas, where NASA has a space center. Many people, like space workers and families, cheered for them at a big welcome home party. The astronauts felt happy to be back with their families and friends. They talked about how amazing it was to be in space and how special Earth is. This mission happened on the same day as an old space mission called Apollo 13, which had a problem but turned out okay.

articles.title: Myrrh Trees in Danger from Drought
articles.summary: Myrrh is a special tree resin from Ethiopia in Africa, used to make expensive perfumes. A big drought is hurting the myrrh trees because they need water to grow. People who collect the resin work hard but earn very little money, sometimes only $3.50 for a kilogram. The perfumes made from myrrh can cost up to $500 a bottle, but the collectors don't get much of that money. Experts are worried because the drought is making it hard for the trees to survive. This affects the people who depend on myrrh for their income. Myrrh has been used for a long time in beauty and health products. The trees are also eaten by hungry animals, making the problem worse. If the trees die, it could hurt the environment and people's jobs. We need to help protect these trees and support the workers.

articles.title: The Masters Golf Prize Money
articles.summary: The Masters golf tournament is giving out a lot of money this year. The total prize is $22.5 million, which is more than last year. The winner will get $4.5 million, and last year's winner got $4.2 million. The Masters is one of four big golf tournaments called majors, and it has the highest prize money this year. Other tournaments like the PGA Championship, British Open, and U.S. Open have not said how much they will give yet. Rory McIlroy is a golfer who might win again this year. If he does, he will be one of only a few players to win two years in a row. The top four players will all get at least $1 million, and even players who don't make it to the end get $25,000. This shows how important and exciting the Masters is for golfers.

articles.title: Pope Leo XIV Speaks Out Against War in Iran
articles.summary: Pope Leo XIV, the leader of the Catholic Church, gave a strong speech in Rome to say that war is wrong. He talked about a war happening between the United States, Israel, and Iran. The Pope said that some leaders think they are all-powerful, which is a bad idea that makes the war worse. He asked everyone to pray for peace and tell their leaders to stop fighting. The Pope held a special prayer service in a big church called St. Peter's Basilica. People from different countries, like the United States and Iran, were there too. The Pope wants peace instead of violence and weapons. He believes that praying can help break the cycle of evil and bring people together.
